description: Add a notification center with unread state and read-state controls.

userStories.title: Persisting notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want read state stored so notification status survives across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Read state is saved durably per notification
Reloading preserves prior read and unread state

userStories.title: Showing unread badges and notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge and notification list so I can see new activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Unread count renders as a badge
Notification list opens from the center UI
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Marking notifications read or unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want to toggle read state so I can manage notifications individually.
acceptanceCriteria: Each notification can be marked read or unread
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filtering notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter by read state so I can focus on unread items.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter options separate read and unread notifications
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clearing read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so I can keep the list tidy.
acceptanceCriteria: Clearing removes all read notifications from the list
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
